content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

A circular track has an outer radius of 21 m and an inner radius of 14 m. Find the area of the track and its width.

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

 Track area = π(R² − r²) = 22/7(441−196) = 770 m2
Width = R−r = 7 m
 Area = 770 m², Width = 7 m
